visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in a bright warehouse retail environment, holding a large, round, grey and white plush ball shaped like the character Kuromi. She is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a black jumper dress. The background features industrial shelving units filled with various toy boxes and outdoor equipment like bicycles. (2) The camera pans and cuts to show colorful pentagonal product packaging on the store shelves, specifically featuring the Cinnamoroll and Pompompurin versions of the inflatable toy. The boxes are bright blue and yellow with Japanese and Chinese text. (3) The woman points to specific diagrams on the side of the box that illustrate the foot-pump inflation mechanism, using her finger to highlight the heart-shaped icon and the pink pump graphic. (4) She turns the Kuromi ball around to reveal a white underside with a small pink air valve, pointing it out to the camera. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a large warehouse store. (5) The woman holds the fully inflated ball with both hands, smiling at the camera as a hand from off-screen reaches in to pat and squeeze the plush surface to demonstrate its softness and bounce.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 打氣有工具 抱抱球. [Subtitle]: 超大的抱抱球. (2) [Subtitle]: 三麗鷗抱抱球. (3) [Subtitle]: 它有三款圖案. (4) [Subtitle]: 有酷洛米. (5) [Subtitle]: 大耳狗以及布丁狗. (6) [Subtitle]: 超可愛的. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後這個799元. (8) [Subtitle]: 它是2024年的日本玩具大賞的. [Variety]: 優秀賞. (9) [Subtitle]: 優秀哦 你知道它這個. (10) [Subtitle]: 好玩在哪裡嗎. (11) [Subtitle]: 它這個東西你打開以後. (12) [Subtitle]: 它旁邊就會有這個 可以踩氣的. (13) [Subtitle]: 你可以用手 或者用踩的. (14) [Subtitle]: 然後把它踏踏踏以後 它就會. (15) [Subtitle]: 它的球球就會彈出來. (16) [Subtitle]: 哇 那可以收回去嗎. (17) [Subtitle]: 可以. (18) [Subtitle]: 因為你把它的那個 氣管拔掉就可以. (19) [Subtitle]: 這裡 拔掉以後它就會洩氣. (20) [Subtitle]: 聽起來像是. [Variety]: 可收納的大氣球. (21) [Subtitle]: 你要拔嗎 不行這裡是展示品. (22) [Subtitle]: 但很可愛 摸起來如何. (23) [Subtitle]: 呃輕輕的 有點像那種. (24) [Subtitle]: 小皮球的感覺啊. (25) [Subtitle]: 所以很適合給小朋友玩. (26) [Subtitle]: 又不會受傷. (27) [Subtitle]: 在家可以打來打去. (28) [Subtitle]: 頂多把花瓶打碎了. (29) [Subtitle]: 哇 花瓶糟糕囉.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 cameraman (hand visible), 1 distant shopper in background aisle.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top under a black sleeveless dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial metal shelving, bicycles on display, and various boxed toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, acoustic-pop background track featuring rhythmic guitar strumming and a light drum beat. A woman's voice, energetic and high-pitched, introduces a 'super big' plush ball. (2) A subtle bubble-pop sound effect triggers as she mentions the character names. The female speaker's tone remains cheerful and informative. (3) A male voice, likely the cameraman, joins the conversation with a lower pitch, asking about the inflation award displayed on the box. The acoustic BGM continues consistently underneath. (4) Vocalized 'step' sounds ('ta-ta-ta') are heard as they discuss the foot-pump mechanism. (5) The conversation concludes with both speakers laughing lightly about the ball's bounce and its safety for household use, ending on a friendly, humorous note as the BGM fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Technical Demonstration -> Safety Assessment -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a specific Sanrio-themed inflatable plush toy ('Biggies') available at Costco, explaining its award-winning status and unique inflation/deflation features while emphasizing its safety for children.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of price (799元) and store location (Costco), along with detailed product feature highlights.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a conversational vlog style to effectively market a retail product through a mix of enthusiasm and practical demonstration.
